_comment: Worked example for build_deck.py. All numbers here are ILLUSTRATIVE, not real configuration data. Replace with figures from your source ledger. Build: python scripts/build_deck.py assets/deck_spec_example.json -o example.pptx --brand ut

slides.headline: Reconciliation remediation: findings and the ask
slides.subtitle: Controller readout — illustrative example deck

slides.headline: Bank lines and subledger transactions meet at matching; whatever fails to pair stays unreconciled
slides.notes: Scuba: BAI2/CAMT/MT940 in; parse rules populate fields; TCRs create ECTs; matching rules plus the reconciliation rule set pair bank lines to system transactions from AR/AP.

slides.headline: The estate spans dozens of accounts and thousands of monthly lines
slides.source: Source: illustrative figures — replace from your exports
slides.notes: Scuba: state the run window and the account scope when these are real.

slides.headline: Two merchant codes absorb most transaction creation rules
slides.notes: Scuba: rule concentration strands real subledger activity as ECTs outside the normal match path.

slides.headline: A single 30-day tolerance lets a match pass on amount and fail on date

left.title: Configured now
items: Date window plus or minus 15 days

right.title: Should be
items: Window sized to real settlement lag

slides.notes: Scuba: a cent-exact candidate posting 22 days later is excluded; one 14 days later passes and is flagged Date Match = N.

slides.headline: Three figures remain unavailable until the results export includes rule attribution
rows: add attribution column to the run
slides.notes: Scuba: state each gap as a claim and name the action that closes it.

slides.headline: Fixing rule concentration and tolerance will raise the auto-match rate and restore date integrity
points: Migrate subledger-suspect TCRs into AP AutoMatch and AR Lockbox
Size the tolerance window to real settlement lag and enable amount tolerance
Ask: approve the process change and the results-export attribution
slides.notes: Restate the main claim in the same words used earlier.
